teaching.course: KAUST ECE 308: Semiconductor Lasers and LEDs
teaching.institution: King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST)
teaching.description: Supported course delivery and taught sessions on vertical-cavity surface-emitting lasers (VCSELs) and epitaxial growth techniques.

portfolio.name: PhD Research Overview: High-speed Optoelectronics and Photonic Integration
portfolio.description: Overview of VCSEL/Micro-LED/photonic integration research with simulation, nanofabrication, and experimental characterization.

portfolio.name: Industry Experience: AR Display Architecture Design
portfolio.description: Lens-free, solid-state AR display engine architecture with compact optical combiner design for AR glasses.

portfolio.name: Optoelectronic Device Applications
portfolio.description: Demonstrated optoelectronic devices for communication, imaging/illumination, random number generation, and hardware security authentication.
